title: Distributed electric open-fan propulsion ATA 61+71
description: Distributed open-fan electric propulsion on DC bus with motor-out certification logic for BWB configuration; technology inherited from AAM/UAM eVTOL programme

title: H2 FC primary power management and peak buffering ATA 24
description: Hydrogen fuel cell primary power with battery buffer for transient peak loads; power management unit architecture for fault-tolerant H2 FC + buffer integration

title: Buffer battery thermal management and DPP ATA 24+96
description: Cryogenic-compatible buffer battery thermal management system; State of Health tracking; Digital Product Passport per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542
clause_refs: EU Battery Reg 2023/1542; CS-25 SC ATA 96
notes: KNOT spillover from KNOT-AAMUAM-LC03-0003; A=0.50; key bidirectional node

title: DO-178C and DO-254 motor controller assurance with AI monitoring
description: Motor controller software DAL A/B per DO-178C and hardware DAL A/B per DO-254; AI-based health monitoring integration with FBW system

title: CS-25 plus Special Conditions certification pathway
description: Certification under CS-25 + Special Conditions leveraging SC-VTOL type certificate precedent from AAM/UAM programme; target EASA type certificate 2031
notes: Depends on SC-VTOL precedent from KNOT-AAMUAM-LC03-0005
